items.title: 'Mbappe is not a dictator' – Deschamps defends France captain against online criticism
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Thousands welcome home Cape Verde footballers after stunning World Cup run
items.dek: Tens of thousands of fans formed an ocean of blue outside the airport in capital city, Praia.
items.body: Tens of thousands of fans formed an ocean of blue outside the airport in capital city, Praia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
items.dek: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".
items.body: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".
items.author: IriLine Desk
